exploration_mode: 3-layer (module discovery + structure tracing + code anchors) via 3 parallel Explore agents; CLI delegate skipped per user

relevant_files.responsibility: Extension entry; instantiates one Runtime; registers 3 hooks (consolidation/compaction-trigger/compaction-hook) + 2 commands (om:status/om:view) + 1 tool (recall)
Shared mutable state: config cache (lazy ensureConfig), 3 in-flight flags, consolidation phase tracker, last-error fields, resolveModel() override
Config interface + DEFAULTS + resolveCompactAfterTokens (calibrated vs ratio scaling by model contextWindow)
turn_end/agent_start → token-clock gate (anyStageDue) → runConsolidationPipeline: observer→reflector→dropper, each appends ledger entries
agent_end → idle check + retryable-error filter + double-check race guard → ctx.compact()
session_before_compact → buildCompactionProjection + renderSummary; NO model call (fast render path)
Observation/Reflection/entry-data types, validators, MEMORY_ID_PATTERN /^[a-f0-9]{12}$/, builders
foldLedger() reducer: walks append-only entries, first-valid-record-wins by id, separates activeObservations from dropped tombstones
buildCompactionProjection (full-fold escalation when pool≥maxTokens), foldProjection (boundary-gated), fullProjection, visibleProjection
recallMemorySources: indexLedger (keeps ALL occurrences for collision detection) → id match → resolve sourceEntryIds; returns active/dropped status + diagnostics
renderSummary: deterministic markdown (CONTEXT_USAGE_INSTRUCTIONS + reflections + observations sections); no model
Token-since-coverage accounting: latestCoverageIndex, rawTokensSinceObservationCoverage/ReflectionCoverage/LastCompaction; source entries only
runObserver: record_observations tool, normalizeSourceEntryIds validation, hashId dedup, tokenCount estimate
Observer extraction contract: NEW observations only, cite valid sourceEntryIds, zero is valid, group similar calls
runReflector: record_reflections tool, pre+post coverage computation, injects [coverage: none|partial|strong] into prompt
Reflector stewardship: support-id provenance set (not checklist), false ids cause unsafe pruning, durable-value bar
runDropper + selectDropCandidates: model proposes ids, deterministic re-sort by coverage→relevance→age→order, capped at maxDrops
Dropper: preservation floor, age-gradient, coverage/relevance guidance, safety-first defaults
Deterministic coverage engine: reflectionSupportCounts, tierForCount (0→none/1→partial/≥2→strong), reflectionCoverageMap
Pool accounting: observationTokenSum, observationPoolFullness, maxDropCountForPool (ceil(tokensOverTarget/avgObsTokens))
hashId(content)=sha256(content).slice(0,12) — deterministic identity backbone for dedup
serializeSourceAddressedBranchEntries ([Source entry id:] labels), renderRecallSourceEntries, truncateRecordContent, nowTimestamp
estimateStringTokens=ceil(length/4), estimateEntryTokens (message via SDK, custom/branch via length/4)
AGENT_LOOP_MAX_TOKENS=32000, boundedMaxTokens=min(model.maxTokens,32K)
recall tool: exact-id reverse lookup (not search), returns source entries behind compacted memory
/om:status: counts, drift suffixes, progress clocks, pool pressure, in-flight, errors
/om:view [+full]: visible/full memory + clipboard copy

call_chains.name: dropper-priority-sort
call_chains.steps: selectDropCandidates→sort(coverageDelta strong=0/partial=1/none=2 || relevanceDelta low=0...critical=3 || ageDelta older=0 || index)→slice(0,maxDrops)

data_flows: Raw conversation chunk → serializeSourceAddressedBranchEntries ([Source entry id:] labels) → observer model → Observation{sourceEntryIds} → hashId dedup → om.observations.recorded ledger entry
Folded active observations → reflectionCoverageMap (none/partial/strong) → reflector model → Reflection{supportingObservationIds} → om.reflections.recorded
Active pool tokens > observationsPoolTargetTokens → maxDropCountForPool → dropper model proposes ids → selectDropCandidates deterministic sort → om.observations.dropped tombstones
Ledger entries → foldLedger/buildCompactionProjection → renderSummary → compaction summary string (what agent sees) — NO model at compaction time
12-char id → recall → indexLedger → source entry resolution → original conversation context recovered

code_anchors.note: MEMORY_ID_PATTERN + Observation/Reflection/MemoryDetails — entire type foundation; sourceEntryIds (obs→raw) and supportingObservationIds (refl→obs) are the provenance links
foldLedger reducer — first-valid-record-wins by id; drops are tombstones excluded from activeObservations but retained for recall
buildCompactionProjection — normal (observations to cut, refl/drops to last full-fold) vs fullFold (pool≥maxTokens escalates); this is visible-vs-full divergence
reflectionCoverageTierForCount: 0→none/1→partial/≥2→strong — the single deterministic function reflector+dropper both depend on
selectDropCandidates lexicographic sort: coverage→relevance→age→order; model proposes, code decides — separation of semantic judgment from deterministic safety
FAST render path proof — only buildCompactionProjection+renderSummary touched; no resolveModel/agentLoop/apiKey anywhere
hashId=sha256(content).slice(0,12) — 4-line identity backbone; same content=same id enables cross-batch dedup
